tracks.meaning: a way or route for traveling from one place to another
a sequence of directories or folders describing the location of a file on a computer system
a course of action or method of proceeding toward a goal
the visible track or trail left behind by an animal's movement
a channel or tube in the body through which something passes, such as a nerve or blood vessel pathway
a course of development or progression in someone's life or career
someone's way of living or the lifestyle they follow, often used in phrases like 'on the path to success'
a legal course of action or procedure to resolve a matter
a narrow track or trail across land, especially one used for walking or hiking
a continuous curve or line traced by a moving point in space
